home.title: Generate better branch names, commits and pull requests
home.description: Standardize your Git workflow with AI-assisted generation.

form.title: Generate better Git suggestions
form.description: Describe what changed and let the AI generate polished suggestions for commits, branches and pull requests.
form.summaryPlaceholder: Example: created the generator results UI, added copy command action and improved dark mode behavior in the navbar.
form.contextPlaceholder: Optional: mention stack, modules affected, naming convention or if it was a refactor, bugfix or new feature.
form.helper: Generates 3 to 5 suggestions with copy-ready output

emptyState.title: Your generated suggestions will appear here
emptyState.description: Describe your change, choose what you want to generate and the app will return polished suggestions for commits, branches and pull requests.

apiKeyDialog.replaceDescription: Update the connected API key to keep generating commits, branches and pull requests with your own account.
apiKeyDialog.title: Configure your API key
apiKeyDialog.description: To generate commits, branches and pull requests, connect your own OpenAI API key.
apiKeyDialog.securityDescription: Your API key is sent to the backend only to be encrypted and stored securely in a protected cookie. After that, it is not exposed again in the browser.
apiKeyDialog.securityRepositoryText: If you want, you can review the full implementation in the public project repository.
apiKeyDialog.tutorialTitle: How to get your API key

tutorialSteps.step2: Go to the API keys area in the platform dashboard.
tutorialSteps.step4: Copy the generated key and paste it into the field below.

apiKeyDialog.inputHelper: The key will be stored securely so the generator can use your own account.

errors.generic: Failed to save the API key

hero.title: Standardize commits, branches and pull requests without wasting time rewriting context.
hero.description: Git Workflow Assistant was created to solve a real team pain point: keeping commit messages consistent.
hero.multiArtifact: Commit, branch and PR in one flow
hero.cardSubtitle: From raw context to cleaner Git
hero.cardInputExample:
- create result cards
- add copy command action
- adjust API key management
- improve multi-language support

pain.listDescription: Inside the company, work was already split into list-based tasks. The problem was not missing context, but turning that context into clear and consistent Git artifacts.
pain.standardDescription: Without a simple tool, each developer wrote commits differently. That made history harder to read and reviews less consistent.
pain.rewriteDescription: The team kept rewriting the same information for commits, branches and pull requests. This project was built to remove that repetitive work.

origin.title: Built from a real team workflow pain
origin.descriptionOne: This project was created because maintaining a commit message standard inside the team kept becoming a recurring problem. The task context already existed, but turning it into strong Git artifacts still took time.
origin.descriptionTwo: The solution was simple: take the task list, add technical comments, and let AI generate cleaner and more consistent suggestions for the whole workflow.

workflow.title: A direct workflow with low friction

step1.title: Paste the task list
step1.description: Use the same list that was already organized by the team.

step2.title: Add technical notes
step2.description: Include stack details, changed modules, implementation context or anything useful.

step3.title: Generate commit, branch and PR
step3.description: Get copy-ready suggestions while keeping consistency and clarity.

opensource.title: Everything open, direct and auditable
opensource.description: This project is 100% open source. Anyone can review the code, inspect the API key security flow and understand how the application works internally.
opensource.securityDescription: The app was designed to use the user's own API key, not the creator's key.
opensource.repositoryDescription: The implementation is public for anyone who wants to inspect the code, study the architecture or contribute.

cta.title: Turn raw context into a better Git history.
cta.description: Paste your list, add technical details and generate more professional Git artifacts in seconds.
